title: Christmas Party Wrap-up
excerpt: We had a great turnout for our 2nd Anniversary/Christmas party on Friday, with many of our members joining us for food, drink and secret condition games (much more fun than it sounds). content:
We had a great turnout for our 2nd Anniversary/Christmas party on Friday, with many of our members joining us for food, drink and secret condition games (much more fun than it sounds). Congratulations to the winner of our best-dressed reveler Dave, with honourable mentions to Ryan and Andy.

We also tallied all of our court bookings and checked them twice. Our top court bookers by total time are:

1) Marc Moreau – 8,010 minutes
2) Molli Hay – 6,525 minutes
3) Brad Salter – 6,480 minutes
4) Julie Multamaki – 5,535 minutes
5) Ryan Johnson – 5,445 minutes

We look forward to seeing you on tour Marc!

Please note that there will be no staffed hours December 24, 25, 31 & January 1, but members will still have access via their fob as usual.

Thank you all for your support in 2017 and here’s to a great 2018!
